subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-05-11
subcodes.first_line: If you have the perceptive power, as soon as you look in the faces of the people, you can observe what ideals are reigning in their hearts.
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
